title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: A tutorial on building a multi-agent AI travel planning system using LangGraph and Groq's Llama 3.3 70B model. The system coordinates four specialized agents (flight, hotel, itinerary, and response agents) integrated with APIs for real-time data and PostgreSQL for memory persistence.
